steps.vulnerability_name: Use typed struct instead of raw bsonMap for coupon validation
steps.description: Reject object payloads and enforce strict coupon format.

steps.vulnerability_name: Add middleware to block Mongo operator keys
steps.description: Defence in depth by rejecting request bodies containing $-prefixed keys.
Apply middleware globally to community router.

verification.description: Operator object in coupon_code must be rejected
Plain string coupon should continue to validate
